title: The Ominous Lunchbox
cover_description: Sunny calmly eating a sandwich in the backseat of a car that’s floating midair, screaming in terror.
host_intro: Tonight, Sunny packs a lunch. Shadow thinks it’s the end of the world.
host_outro: Sunny’s lunchbox is now a national monument. Nobody knows why.
script:
[TITLE: The Ominous Lunchbox]
[HOST_INTRO: Tonight, Sunny packs a lunch. Shadow thinks it’s the end of the world.]
[HOST_OUTRO: Sunny’s lunchbox is now a national monument. Nobody knows why.]
[AGE: 9-12]
[VOICES: young_sweet, mysterious_witch, musical_original]
[COMEDY_TYPE: ominous_mundane]

[SETUP]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: gentle, warm] Sunny stands in the kitchen, holding a lunchbox. [STING: sweet_pause]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: ominous, confident] The lunchbox glows with an eerie, unnatural light. [STING: witch_ominous]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: deadpan, unbothered] It’s just a sandwich. And an apple. And a juice box. [STING: medium_hit]

[BEAT_1]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: building, pressing] The sandwich... it moves. [STING: buildup_short]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: suspicious, quiet] That’s because it’s ham. Ham is meat. Meat does that. [STING: tiny]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: triumphant] The ham has *eyes*. [STING: villain_dramatic]

[BEAT_2]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] Okay, that’s new. [STING: mouse_surprise]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] The apple *rolls* toward the edge of the box! [STING: buildup_long]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: deadpan] It’s a round apple. Round things roll. [STING: deflation]

[BEAT_3]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: stunned, panicked] The juice box... it *speaks*. [STING: big_crash]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: quiet, devastating] That’s the straw. It’s a juice *box*. [STING: silence]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: scrambling] The lunchbox lid *snaps shut* on its own! [STING: villain_fail]

[BUTTON]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: unbothered] I’m just gonna eat it in the car. [STING: sweet_eyeroll]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] [PUNCHLINE]The car is now a sentient, screaming entity.[/PUNCHLINE] [STING: big_crash]

[COVER: Sunny calmly eating a sandwich in the backseat of a car that’s floating midair, screaming in terror.]
[PREMISE: A normal lunch becomes apocalyptic]
